subject: Pete Sumalo Montejo
summary: Pete Sumalo Montejo, 72, LPR since 1962, died Dec 5, 2025 from septic shock/pneumonia after 284 days in custody. Multiple hospitalizations June-Nov. Elderly detainee with recurrent infections - preventable death.

victim_details.name: Pete Sumalo Montejo
victim_details.location_of_death: Valley Baptist Medical Center, Harlingen, TX
victim_details.cause_actual: Medical neglect - recurrent infections in elderly detainee
